ddls:
CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the file type */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the file */,
  "original_mime_type" TEXT /* Original MIME type of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "is_image" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the file type is an image */,
  "is_document" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the file type is a document */,
  "is_archive" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the file type is an archive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "download_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the download state */,
  "state_description" TEXT /* Description of the download state (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the state is a final state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the file type
Original MIME type of the file
Flag to indicate if the file type is an image
Flag to indicate if the file type is a document
Flag to indicate if the file type is an archive
Unique identifier for the download state
Description of the download state (e.g., completed, in-progress)
Flag to indicate if the state is a final state
